prompt:
Subject: Sand Grains and Summer Gaze

Main Figure: A woman in her 20s lying face down on a white sand beach, looking back over her shoulder at the camera. The person enters large from the center to the bottom left, with eyes following diagonally from the foreground legs and waist, to the mid-ground upper body, and the face near the upper right. An immersive beach portrait taken from a short distance, leaving a wide view of blue sea and sky.

Person/Expression: Bright fair skin leaning toward ivory-beige. Soft luster on cheeks, tip of the nose, shoulders, and back, naturally preserving fine texture and sand grains. Pale rose-pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eye makeup, long slender eyelashes, natural eye bags, soft brown eyebrows, and sheer pink-beige gloss lips. Small catchlights in the eyes, smiling gently at the camera while squinting slightly.

Clothing/Pose: A delicate ruffled separate swimsuit with pale blue floral pattern on white background. Carefully depicts thin shoulder straps, back ribbons, and light ruffles around the waist. The body extends diagonally from the lower left to the upper right, with the left forearm supporting the upper body. Right elbow bent, with right fingertips placed beside the cheek. Face looking back over the right shoulder, creating a natural twist in the back and waist. Fine sand adheres to thighs, waist, and arms, expressing the weight of the elbows and body sinking into the sand.

Background/Light: High-transparency emerald blue sea, white shoreline, distant reefs, and small green islands. Deep blue sky with few clouds. A natural coast with no sense of daily life, like a quiet remote island in Okinawa. Hard daylight from a high sun casts bright highlights on cheeks, shoulders, back, and thighs. Short, contoured shadows are cast under the body, with weak blue-green reflected light from the sea surface.

Composition/Camera: Landscape 4:3. Low camera position grazing the sand surface. Close-up shot with a wide-angle lens around 24mm, placing the foreground legs large and the face toward the upper right of the screen. The horizon is slightly above the center. Precise focus on face and shoulders, with the extreme foreground slightly blurred. Maintains natural body proportions while keeping wide-angle perspective.

Texture/Style: High-definition gravure-style beach photograph with natural light. Skin is not overly smoothed, delicately drawing pores, peach fuzz, moisture, and sand particles. Medium-long hair in bright milk tea ash brown. Depicts thin see-through bangs, layers around the face, loosely curled ends, and thin stray hairs blowing in the wind strand by strand. Blue and white are kept vivid, avoiding excessive HDR or artificial saturation.

Negative: Figures looking underage, unnatural faces, unnatural gazes, excessive body deformation, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, floating, unnatural gravity, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, excessive skin retouching, plastic-like skin, excessive HDR, text, logos, watermarks.

promptZh:
主题：沙粒与夏日凝视

主体：一位 20 多岁的女性 俯卧在白色沙滩上，回眸看向镜头。人物从画面中心延伸至左下角，视线沿对角线从前景的腿部和腰部，过渡到中景的上半身，最后落在右上角附近的脸部。这是一个近距离拍摄的沉浸式海滩肖像，留出了宽广的 蓝海与天空 背景视野。

人物/表情：明亮的白皙皮肤，偏向象牙米色。脸颊、鼻尖、肩膀和背部带有柔和的光泽，自然地保留了细腻的纹理和沙粒感。淡玫瑰粉色腮红，香槟米色与粉棕色眼妆，修长的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，柔和的棕色眉毛，以及清透的粉米色唇彩。眼中带有细小的眼神光，微微眯眼，对着镜头温柔微笑。

服装/姿势：一套 精致的荷叶边分体泳衣，白色底色配淡蓝色花卉图案。细致描绘了细肩带、背部系带以及腰部轻盈的荷叶边。身体从左下角向右上角呈对角线延伸，左前臂支撑着上半身。右肘弯曲，右手手指轻触脸颊旁。脸部越过右肩回望，使背部和腰部呈现自然的扭转感。细沙附着在大腿、腰部和手臂上，表现出肘部和身体陷入沙中的重量感。

背景/光线：高透明度的翡翠蓝海、白色海岸线、远处的礁石和绿色小岛。深蓝色的天空中云朵稀少。一个 没有生活气息的自然海岸，如冲绳安静的离岛。来自高处太阳的强硬日光在脸颊、肩膀、背部和大腿上投下明亮的高光。身体下方投下短促且轮廓分明的阴影，并带有来自海面的微弱蓝绿色反射光。

构图/相机：横向 4:3。低机位贴近沙面拍摄。使用约 24mm 广角镜头的特写镜头，将前景的腿部放大，脸部置于画面右上角。地平线略高于中心。焦点精确对准脸部和肩膀，极近的前景略微模糊。在保持广角透视的同时，维持自然的人体比例。

纹理/风格：高清写真风格的海滩摄影，采用自然光。皮肤未经过度磨皮，细腻地刻画了毛孔、绒毛、水分和沙粒。中长发，明亮的奶茶灰棕色。描绘了稀薄的透视刘海、脸部周围的层次感、松散的卷发发尾，以及随风飘动的细碎发丝。蓝色和白色保持鲜艳，避免过度的 HDR 或人工饱和度。

负面提示词：未成年形象、不自然的脸部、不自然的视线、身体过度变形、多指、缺指、肢体融合、关节断裂、漂浮、不自然的重力、透视错误、阴影与光源不一致、皮肤过度修饰、塑料感皮肤、过度 HDR、文字、Logo、水印。
